sensorNote: Emergency Exit Door Alarm Guard with IoT Monitoring

l4Subsystems.name: Mechanical locking/release subsystem
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Spring-loaded mechanical-primary is preferred for hotels due to power-independence mandate (C2) and retrofit simplicity (C5).

alternatives.name: Magnetic latch with alarm trigger (no physical blocker)

materials.name: Spring steel (carbon steel, high-tensile)
materials.source: Standard for small coil/torsion springs; cost-effective, reliable fatigue life

materials.name: Stainless steel (304/316)
materials.source: IP45 outdoor / humid environments; corrosion-resistant premium

materials.name: Zinc die-cast (ZA-8 or Zamak alloys)
materials.source: Cost-effective; standard in door hardware fittings; ~69% of volume-based hardware uses zinc alloy (Grand View Research, Door Hardware Market 2024)

materials.name: Stainless steel (stamped, 304)
materials.source: Corrosion resistance; premium segment; ~38% of global door hardware by material volume (Verified Market Research 2024)

materials.name: Carbon steel (zinc-plated)
materials.source: Lowest cost; declining due to corrosion concerns

materials.name: Brass (CuZn39Pb3)
materials.source: Traditional key cylinder material; machinability, corrosion resistance

materials.name: Zinc alloy (die-cast)
materials.source: Cost reduction; slightly lower durability

materials.name: Stainless steel
materials.source: Analyst estimate; high-security / corrosive environments

l4Subsystems.name: Acoustic alarm subsystem
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: The alarm transducer must operate at 0 V (C2 — absolute constraint). This eliminates all alternatives that require continuous power. Only piezoelectric disc and mechanical striker pass this constraint. The 70% piezo dominance reflects regulatory selection pressure.

materials.name: PZT ceramic (Lead Zirconate Titanate)
materials.source: Industry standard piezo material; high piezoelectric coefficient; used in virtually all commercial alarm horns

materials.name: Lead-free BaTiO3 (Barium Titanate) ceramic
materials.source: RoHS/REACH compliance push; lower coefficient but improving

materials.name: PVDF polymer film
materials.source: Analyst estimate; flexible, low voltage — used in thin transducers

materials.name: ABS polymer
materials.source: Cost, moldability, acoustic properties; dominant in electronic housings

materials.name: PC/ABS blend
materials.source: Better impact resistance; used in higher-grade devices

materials.name: Glass-filled nylon (PA66-GF)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; dimensional stability at temperature extremes

materials.name: Stainless steel (stamped, 304)
materials.source: Corrosion resistance; fatigue-critical component in safety device

materials.name: Zinc-plated carbon steel
materials.source: Cost reduction; corrosion risk in humid environments (hotel stairwells)

materials.name: Engineering polymer (POM / acetal)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; weight reduction; creep risk at elevated load

l4Subsystems.name: IoT telemetry subsystem
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Hotels increasingly standardize on BACnet/IP or KNX BMS platforms. EasyWave's proprietary protocol creates C6 lock-in. BLE and Zigbee alternatives are gaining share in new hotel builds; LoRaWAN suits large resort/campus properties. GfS wireless BUS gateway partially bridges C6 but does not eliminate it.

materials.name: FR4 (epoxy resin + woven glass fiber)
materials.source: Industry standard for IoT device PCBs; cost-effective, well-characterized

materials.name: Rogers/PTFE high-frequency laminate
materials.source: Analyst estimate; used only where RF performance is critical at high frequency

materials.name: Flexible polyimide (FPC)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; space-constrained folded assemblies

materials.name: NdFeB (Neodymium Iron Boron, sintered)
materials.source: Highest energy density; standard for small magnet applications in electronics

materials.name: Ferrite (BaFe12O19)
materials.source: Lower energy density; cost advantage in price-sensitive applications

materials.name: MnO2 (Manganese Dioxide)
materials.source: ~40% of cell mass

materials.name: LiMnO2 or LiSO2 active material
materials.source: ~55% of cell energy

l4Subsystems.name: Enclosure/mounting subsystem
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Surface-mounted polymer housing is the standard. For 4–5-star hotels, C5 (visible protrusion) creates aesthetic friction. Semi-recessed alternatives are gaining share as premium hospitality increasingly specifies minimalist door hardware aesthetics.

alternatives.name: Semi-recessed polymer housing (requires shallow door channel)

materials.name: Polyurethane powder coat
materials.source: Industry standard for safety-colored hardware; durable, scratch-resistant

materials.name: Liquid polyurethane paint (spray)
materials.source: Lower tooling cost; less durability

materials.name: Integral pigmented polymer (co-injection/colored resin)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; no secondary coating step; color stability over UV exposure

materials.name: Stainless steel (A2-70, 304)
materials.source: Corrosion resistance; preferred for surface-mounted hardware in humid stairwells

materials.name: Zinc-plated carbon steel
materials.source: Cost-effective; corrosion risk in hotel stairwell environments

materials.name: Polymer/nylon (for glass-frame variant)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; non-metallic for glass-panel doors

materials.name: Steel (stamped, powder-coated)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; standard adapter plate material

materials.name: Aluminum (extruded)
materials.source: Analyst estimate; lighter, architectural aesthetic
